category_sources: Official Massdriver docs describe Massdriver as an internal developer platform for infrastructure-as-code components.
source_facts.description says it manages applications and infrastructure on Massdriver Cloud.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is massdriver and source_facts.homepage is the official Massdriver site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/massdriver-cloud/mass, so repo was not redetermined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Massdriver docs describe infrastructure-as-code bundles and developer platform workflows.
source_facts.description identifies cloud application and infrastructure management.
